steps.title: Factor the left side
steps.content:
Combine the terms with $x$ by factoring.
$$-8x+48px=(-8+48p)x$$

steps.title: Use the no solution condition
steps.content:
The equation has no solution when the coefficient of $x$ is $0$ but the other side is not $0$. That creates the false statement $0=96$.
$$-8+48p=0$$

steps.title: Solve for the constant
steps.content: Solve the coefficient equation. $$48p=8$$ $$p=\frac{1}{6}$$ The answer is D.
